action_scenario: hiking on a forest trail with a daypack, casual outdoor clothes, full-body shot, face turned toward camera

base.prompt: A photographic, candid, head-and-shoulders portrait of a fictional woman in their sixties, of Northern European descent, with straight blonde hair and sharp hazel eyes, a calm, neutral expression. warm afternoon sunlight. a textured beige wall. Realistic skin texture, natural pores, no makeup, no glasses, no jewelry, no text, no watermark, sharp focus on the face. This is a fictional character — do not generate a real or named person.

lookalikes.prompt: Full body shot of a woman in her late 50s, fair skin with some sun damage and freckles, hiking on a forest trail, wearing casual outdoor clothes, a daypack on her back. Her face is turned directly towards the camera, with a gentle smile. She has a heart-shaped face with a softer jawline. Her hair is wavy, shoulder-length, blonde with visible grey roots, parted on the right. Her eyes are round, deep blue, and set close together, with slightly thicker, light brown eyebrows. Her nose is aquiline with a prominent bridge, and her lips are full with a subtle upturn. Photographic, sharp focus, realistic skin texture.

A full-body shot of a woman in her late 40s to early 50s hiking on a forest trail with a daypack, wearing casual outdoor clothes. She has fair skin with a few sunspots and faint smile lines, and a sprinkling of freckles across her high cheekbones. Her face is heart-shaped with a delicate, angular jawline. Her hair is straight, chin-length, and blonde with subtle silver streaks, parted on the right. Her eyes are round, blue, and set close together, with slightly arched, medium brown eyebrows. She has a small, upturned nose and full lips with a slightly upturned, natural smile. Her head is angled slightly upwards, looking directly at the viewer. Photographic, sharp focus, realistic skin texture.
